use_cases: Organizing content sections within a dashboard or settings page
Creating multi-step forms with tabbed navigation
Building documentation pages with content categories
Switching between views in admin panels
Creating profile or account management interfaces
ai_summary: A minimalist tab navigation component from Base UI featuring a sliding indicator that animates between tab positions. Supports keyboard navigation with focus-visible states and hover interactions. Clean flat design with gray color palette suitable for dashboard, settings, or content organization interfaces in SaaS applications.
